name: global-iterations
description: Rewrite every review target from the combined feedback corpus into global iteration outputs.

interface.shortDescription: Rewrite all sites from the same feedback corpus.
interface.longDescription: Global Iterations reads all intake feedback once, inventories ReviewTargets, and rewrites each current site into ReviewTargets/global-iterations so every target evolves from its own current state without chained refinement loops.
interface.defaultPrompt: Rewrite every site in ReviewTargets against the combined intake feedback, then add each generated revision under ReviewTargets/global-iterations.
